name: Kinetic Seas Inc.
business: Kinetic Seas Inc. is an artificial intelligence consulting, research and development, and software company focused on delivering practical, locally deployed AI solutions. The company provides consulting, training, product development, and partnership services, and has developed a proprietary AI platform called Skilliks.

exposures.sentence: We focus on simplifying AI integration by developing and licensing scalable AI solutions, providing training and implementation support, and delivering locally deployed AI systems designed for real-world enterprise use.

catalysts.event: Development and licensing of Skilliks platform
catalysts.sentence: During fiscal year 2025, we developed Skilliks, a proprietary AI software platform designed to support enterprise software development, AI integration, and workflow automation. Skilliks was licensed to an international client pursuant to a multi-year licensing agreement.
Effective January 2025, the Company discontinued the use of third-party payroll services and transitioned its former employees to independent consultant roles.

tamClaims.claim: 90% of businesses will adopt AI in three years
tamClaims.sentence: Industry sources predict 90% of businesses will adopt AI of some type in the next three years.
